text: Happy people are energetic. Flint is happy. Which conclusion is correct?

options.text: Flint is energetic.
All happy people are Flints.
Flint is sad.
Flint is always happy.

text: If Claire washes the dishes, Clint will sweep the floor. Clint is sweeping the floor. Which conclusion is correct?

options.text: Claire is sleeping.
Clint will wash the dishes too.
Claire is washing the dishes.
Clint and Clara are grounded.

explanation: Note: This is affirming the consequent — technically invalid, but in context answer is c

text: Some heroes wear capes. All parents are heroes. Which conclusion is correct?

options.text: Some heroes are capes.
All parents wear capes.
Some parents wear capes.
All heroes are capes.

text: Kuisha loves to travel. Which is the best inference?

options.text: She loves to drink coffee.
She would love to go on a trip to Japan.
Her boyfriend is a foreigner.
She will spend the holidays with her family.

text: Exercising helps increase feel-good hormones in the body. Which inference is correct?

options.text: I should exercise if I want to sleep.
I should exercise if I want to feel happy.
Eating healthy foods makes me happy.
I will feel sad after jogging.

text: If Jemima travels to South Korea, she will buy a keychain for Karen. If Karen receives a keychain from Jemima, she will treat her with ice cream. Which is/are valid conclusions?

options.text: If Karen treats Jemima with ice cream, that means Jemima went to North Korea.
If Jemima is being treated by Karen with ice cream, then she must have given Karen a keychain.
both a and b
neither a nor b

text: The drink inside the pitcher is either juice or soda. Which inference is correct?

options.text: If it is juice, then it is soda.
The drink is a soda, so it is also juice.
If it is juice, then it has alcohol.
The drink is a soda, so it is not juice.

text: Some Filipinos are students. Some Koreans are students. All students are intelligent. Which conclusion is correct?

options.text: Some Filipinos are Koreans.
All Koreans are students.
All Koreans are intelligent.
Some Filipinos are intelligent.

text: Upon arrival at the airport, Lena proceeded to buy a ticket. What could be the best reason?

options.text: She does not have a ticket.
She is flying to Singapore.
She just wants to buy a ticket.
She wants to go to the pre-departure area.

text: If Mia proceeded to Gates 1-10, which inference is correct?

options.text: She is traveling to another country.
She does not have a ticket.
She is traveling to a destination within the country.
Gates 11-20 are closed.

text: Which is NOT a direct reason why Ann went home?

options.text: She does not have more than P1,000 in her account.
She does not have money left after buying clothes.
She bought some take-away food.
She found an ATM.

text: What is the reason why Ann bought take-away food?

options.text: She bought some clothes.
She does not have money left after buying clothes.
Ann has a mobile banking application.
Ann still has money left after buying clothes.

text: Which is NOT a main reason for Ann going to the mall?

options.text: to buy some clothes
to buy some take-away food
to download a mobile banking application
both a and b

text: Ever proceeded directly to the first interview after submitting her CV. Why?

options.text: She passed the application process.
She printed her CV.
She is applying for the position of customer service.
She will take the written exam.

text: Gel went home. Which is a valid assumption?

options.text: Gel passed the second interview and is done signing the contract.
Gel did not pass the second interview.
both a and b
neither a nor b

text: Which is a direct reason why Zoren will take a written exam?

options.text: He is applying for the position of customer service.
He does not have a CV.
He passed the application process.
He is applying for the position of financial analyst.

text: Ken is having his lunch. Which is an INCORRECT assumption?

options.text: Ken has extra money.
Ken did not take a bath.
Ken will take an afternoon nap afterward.
Ken reheated the leftovers from his breakfast.

text: Which is a correct assumption based on the flowchart?

options.text: Since Ken woke up after 8:00 am, he will go for a jog.
Ken will go to the deli even if he is out of money.
Ken will watch television after waking up from his afternoon nap.
Ken will read a book if he did not take a bath.
